---
title: "Flight Delay Predictions"
subtitle: "Data Scientist | UC Berkeley | Apr 2025"
date: "2025-04-01"
image: ../../assets/images/projects/flight-delay.png
image-alt: "Flight delay predictions project"
description: "A Databricks ML project predicting U.S. domestic flight delays using PySpark and MLlib at scale across millions of flight records."
categories: [Machine Learning, PySpark, Databricks]
---

![Flight Delay Predictions](../../assets/images/projects/flight-delay.png){.project-banner}

A Databricks-based machine learning project aimed at predicting U.S. domestic flight delays by analyzing millions of flight records. Using PySpark and MLlib, we applied distributed data processing and classification models at scale. Feature engineering and model training were executed using MapReduce-style operations to identify delay patterns influenced by weather, airline, and airport congestion factors. The project demonstrates how cloud-native platforms and big data tools can enable scalable, real-time predictive analytics.

[Website](https://bakr-ucb.github.io/261-Final-Project/){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"} | [Final Presentation](https://github.com/bakr-UCB/261-Final-Project/blob/main/reports/figures/Phase_III_Final_Presentation.pdf){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
